title: Double Doors
description: Don't click twice, open doors dramatically with ease!
body:
This datapack (and mod) makes opening those 2-block-wide doors one click easier, opening both in one click. It supports all wooden doors, and should be update proof unless there are major changes to how doors work.

This datapack will not affect doors opened by redstone or villagers.
By pressing your sneak key, you can avoid toggling extra doors, in case you would like to only open one.

This pack is safe to remove after it has been installed on your world.
If you experience issues, please join my discord server and message me about it and I'll get back to you ASAP.
